标题: YSL Le Cassandre hooded sweatshirt, made of 32s single and double yarn + 21s single yarn brushed fabric, weighing 360g. This hooded sweatshirt is made of cotton fabric, featuring a kangaroo pocket. The 32s base fabric is woven with 32s single yarn and processed with brushing technique to create a dense layer of fleece on the fabric surface. Sizes available: S-XL.

YSL Le Cassandre hooded sweatshirt, made of 32s single and double yarn + 21s single yarn brushed fabric, weighing 360g. This hooded sweatshirt is made of cotton fabric, featuring a kangaroo pocket. The 32s base fabric is woven with 32s single yarn and processed with brushing technique to create a dense layer of fleece on the fabric surface. Sizes available: S-XL.

YSL's Vichy gray pure wool couple's knitted sweater combines the classic Vichy gray with 100% pure wool, elevating the autumn and winter vibe. Setting itself apart from ordinary gray tones, YSL's specially crafted Vichy gray exudes a vintage filter effect, with a matte velvet texture under sunlight and a hint of coolness within its cold tones. The white YSL logo embroidered on the chest is delicately stitched, not ostentatious but exuding a refined elegance understood by those in the know. The delicate velvety feel of 100% wool is like wrapping the skin in a layer of "warm cloud," with a weight of 300g that perfectly supports a relaxed yet structured silhouette without feeling heavy. The drape extends naturally from the shoulder line to the hem. The ribbed cuffs, hem, and neckline are snugly tailored, each stitch reflecting YSL's meticulous craftsmanship. The smooth stitching at the shoulder line ensures a natural drape when worn, preventing bulging or deformation. Sizes: XS-XL XS: Shoulder 42cm, Bust 98cm, Length 67cm S: Shoulder 43cm, Bust 102cm, Length 69cm M: Shoulder 44cm, Bust 106cm, Length 71cm L: Shoulder 45cm, Bust 110cm, Length 73cm XL: Shoulder 46cm, Bust 114cm, Length 75cm

Introducing the YSL 2025FW autumn/winter new arrival imported wool knit round neck sweater, a unisex basic pullover knit with small logo embroidery! With its exceptional fabric, unique design, and tailored fit, it has become a favorite in the fashion world! It's not just a piece of clothing, but a fashion statement, a pursuit of quality living! This sweater is meticulously crafted with imported wool yarn, featuring delicate knit patterns that not only give it a unique texture but also excellent skin-friendly properties! When worn, it fits snugly like a second skin, without any sense of constraint! Its excellent warmth retention makes it a warm embrace in the cold winter days, wrapping your body tightly to shield you from the harsh cold, providing warmth and comfort at all times! The classic small logo embroidery on the chest is the finishing touch, symbolizing the brand's soul, embodying its history, culture, and philosophy! Each letter is carefully designed, with smooth lines and delicate stitching, like a beautiful poem written with needle and thread! The tailored fit design is neither too loose nor too tight, like a thoughtful designer who meticulously cuts according to your body curves, outlining your figure perfectly! Whether paired with other items or worn alone, it exudes a fashionable and confident aura! Sizes available: XS-L.

YSL embroidered knit cardigan, made of twisted flower cotton knit fabric with delicate texture, comfortable and skin-friendly. It exudes a subtle radiance with the iconic YSL logo embroidered on the chest, serving as a visual focal point. The twisted stitching structure design injects soul into the garment, embodying architectural aesthetics when worn. The orderly aesthetic of the buttons reveals a discreet elegance. With a lazy yet elegant demeanor, it creates a graceful landscape. Utilizing imported machine embroidery technology, advanced computer control systems, and precision mechanical components, the embroidery work is precise with smooth and delicate lines. The garment is intricately crafted using a combination of handwork and machinery, with each row requiring meticulous hand connections. The garment undergoes a washing and softening process to improve its feel and appearance. Available in sizes S-XL.

YSL Saint Laurent denim jacket, made with custom-made premium denim fabric. The fabric is treated with a special solution of imported snow wash and salt, along with a certain amount of dye. The denim material is soaked in the solution to absorb it, then washed and air-dried to further fade and oxidize. Sizes available: S-XL.

YSL embroidered shirt-style jacket, tailored with breathable long-staple combed cotton. SAINT LAURENT YSL printed hooded jacket is made of 100% polyester fiber, known for its excellent tear resistance and durability. It quickly regains its smooth appearance during wear, maintaining a crisp and stylish look. It is long-lasting and maintains its shape even after repeated washing. The lining is a blend of 58% cupro fiber and 42% cotton. Cupro fiber is known as "breathable artificial silk," with a smooth and soft surface that feels silky and cool. The addition of cotton provides natural skin-friendly properties. The combination of the two materials offers a top-notch skin-friendly experience. The logo letters are firmly attached to the chest through heat pressing, creating a durable and friction-resistant SAINT LAURENT logo print. Sizes available: 46-52.
